illegal_identifier_start_char.cause: Variable name starts with an illegal character (e.g., '$' or a digit) and is not escaped.
illegal_identifier_start_char.rule: Standard identifiers must start with a letter or an underscore. Identifiers with special chars (like '$') must be Escaped Identifiers: start with backslash '\' and end with whitespace.
illegal_identifier_start_char.fix_strategy: Prepend backslash to the identifier if it contains special characters, or rename it to start with a letter/underscore. If the line is an artifact (e.g. Yosys $auto), delete it.
